name: Korean Pharmaceutical Information MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Korean pharmaceutical and drug information from HIRA (Health Insurance Review & Assessment Service). Enables AI agents to look up Korean drug ingredient and product data by HIRA component and product codes — supporting pharmaceutical research, clinical decision support, and Korean healthcare workflows.
use_cases: Looking up Korean drug ingredient information from clinical AI agents
Querying HIRA pharmaceutical product codes from healthcare analytics agents
Researching Korean drug interactions and classifications from medical research agents
Building Korean healthcare decision support workflows using HIRA drug data
not_for: Real-time clinical decision support without physician oversight
best_when: A Korean healthcare professional, researcher, or developer wants AI agents to access Korean pharmaceutical data from HIRA — enabling programmatic drug lookups for Korean clinical and research workflows.
avoid_when: You need FDA or EMA drug data (non-Korean). Also: NEVER use AI drug lookups as sole clinical decision support — always involve licensed healthcare professionals.

auth.notes: HIRA API key may be required. HIRA API access for Korean healthcare data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: HIRA API data is publicly available; MCP server is free
pricing.notes: Free open source MCP server. HIRA pharmaceutical data is publicly available in Korea.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Medical and pharmaceutical data is sensitive — implement strict access controls
Documentation primarily in Korean — non-Korean speakers will face challenges
HIRA data is Korea-specific — not applicable for other national pharmaceutical systems
NEVER use for sole clinical decision support — require physician oversight
Community implementation — verify data accuracy against official HIRA sources
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Pharmaceutical data is medically sensitive. Korean data residency (HIRA). NEVER deploy for autonomous clinical decisions without physician oversight. Access should be restricted to authorized medical personnel.

security_score_components.security_notes: Medical data sensitivity. Korean HIRA system. Physician oversight required for clinical use.
